steps.title: Use the reason clause
steps.content: The word since introduces the reason for the description: excavating the fossil can take weeks or months of hard, physically tiring work. The blank needs a word for a demanding, laborious process.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice B means ordinary or frequent, but the sentence describes effort, not frequency. Choice C means quick, contradicting weeks or even months. Choice D concerns cost, which the sentence never discusses. The answer is A.
